content:
MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
CAUTION — Low volatility (Vol: 19.3%) but very narrow participation (Breadth: 0/8 sectors positive), signaling low vol + weak breadth conflict.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals CORRECTION: TRALT (1W: +7.97% | 1M: +3.72%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +5.18% | 1M: +17.86%) ABOVE TREND; Retail & Food CORRECTION: BIMAS (1W: +2.59% | 1M: +8.65%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Technology & Telecom BELOW TREND: TCELL (1W: -8.75% | 1M: -5.85%) BELOW TREND, TTKOM (1W: -6.66% | 1M: -1.59%) BELOW TREND; Holding & Investment BELOW TREND: SAHOL (1W: -6.95% | 1M: -7.41%) BELOW TREND.

STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TRALT (1W: +7.97% | 1M: +3.72%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +5.18% | 1M: +17.86%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +3.60% | 1M: +18.59%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +3.38% | 1M: +46.65%) ABOVE TREND, BIMAS (1W: +2.59% | 1M: +8.65%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
SASA (1W: -19.60% | 1M: +4.04%) CORRECTION, KONTR (1W: -18.58% | 1M: -14.29%) BELOW TREND, TKFEN (1W: -11.21% | 1M: +13.69%) CORRECTION, TCELL (1W: -8.75% | 1M: -5.85%) BELOW TREND, ENKAI (1W: -8.63% | 1M: -2.77%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Upside momentum: TRALT (1W: +7.97% | 1M: +3.72%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +5.18% | 1M: +17.86%) ABOVE TREND; downside momentum: SASA (1W: -19.60% | 1M: +4.04%) CORRECTION, KONTR (1W: -18.58% | 1M: -14.29%) BELOW TREND.

SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking under pressure and structurally BELOW TREND; AKBNK (1W: -6.64% | 1M: -10.45%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -5.46% | 1M: -7.29%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -4.67% | 1M: -4.67%) BELOW TREND, HALKB (1W: +1.61% | 1M: +1.56%) ABOVE TREND is the lone outlier.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed signals; KRDMD (1W: +3.60% | 1M: +18.59%) ABOVE TREND and EREGL (1W: -3.97% | 1M: +25.94%) CORRECTION show earnings/metal strength, while FROTO (1W: -6.21% | 1M: -13.81%) BELOW TREND and ASELS (1W: -3.15% | 1M: +0.79%) CORRECTION are weaker.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Selective leaders but short-term weakness: PETKM (1W: +5.18% | 1M: +17.86%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +7.97% | 1M: +3.72%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +3.38% | 1M: +46.65%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: -19.60% | 1M: +4.04%) CORRECTION and TRMET (1W: -0.65% | 1M: -10.66%) BELOW TREND caution against broad exposure.

PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Cautious, selectively long quant leaders (PETKM, PETKM (1W: +5.18% | 1M: +17.86%) ABOVE TREND; BIMAS, KRDMD) and reduce exposure to high-beta tech/transport names (TCELL, TAVHL, KONTR); raise cash/hedges until breadth recovers.

NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
PETKM (1W: +5.18% | 1M: +17.86%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation, TRALT (1W: +7.97% | 1M: +3.72%) ABOVE TREND for sector flows, SASA (1W: -19.60% | 1M: +4.04%) CORRECTION for bounce or capitulation, TCELL (1W: -8.75% | 1M: -5.85%) BELOW TREND for downside follow-through.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Energy & Chemicals (watch PETKM/TRALT re-risk), Technology & Telecom (monitor earnings/flows into TCELL/TTKOM), Banking (watch AKBNK/GARAN for credit-risk sentiment).

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to the short-term trend band (near-term support = recent 1W lows, resistance = 1M moving average); catalysts: CBRT communication on policy, USD/TRY moves, Q1 results flow and global risk sentiment.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
CAUTION regime: low volatility masks collapsing breadth — market is narrow and stock-specific. Favor quant leaders (PETKM, BIMAS, KRDMD) and defensive sizing; avoid telecom, holdings and construction until breadth and a clear breakout confirm risk-on.
